headline: Ederson Fabrizio Romano
body: ✅⚫️🔵🇧🇷 Ederson Fabrizio Romano (FabrizioRomano) 🚨🇧🇷 Éderson to Manchester United not expected be revisited or reactivated at any time this summer. Discussions completely collapsed since Friday last week, as revealed. Éderson has received new contract proposal from Atalanta. —
raw_text:
✅⚫️🔵🇧🇷 #Ederson


Fabrizio Romano (@FabrizioRomano)

🚨🇧🇷 Éderson to Manchester United not expected be revisited or reactivated at any time this summer.

Discussions completely collapsed since Friday last week, as revealed.

Éderson has received new contract proposal from Atalanta.





— https://nitter.net/FabrizioRomano/status/2076947557800939857#m
